basic_details.job_title: ICAR IVRI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Indian Veterinary Research Institute (IVRI) has released the official notification for the recruitment of Young Professional posts. This recruitment drive aims to fill 5 contractual vacancies with eligible candidates having qualifications such as Graduate, B.Tech, M.Tech, or Post Graduate degrees. Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 42,000/- per month depending on the position.

age_limit.details: Young Professional-II (YP-II) (Dairy Engineering): 21 to 45 years Young Professional-II (YP-II) (Dairy Chemistry): Age limit not specified. Young Professional-II (YP-II) (IT): 21 to 45 years Young Professional-I (YP-I) (IT): 21 to 45 years Young Professional-II (YP-II) (IT): 21 to 45 years

qualification.details: Young Professional-II (YP-II) (Dairy Engineering): Under Graduate in Engineering/ B Tech (Agricultural Engineering/Dairy Technology/Dairy Science/Food Technology/Food Process Engineering/Food and Nutrition) or M.Tech (Dairy Engineering/Food Process Engineering/Dairy Technology/Food Technology/Mechanical Engineering). Preference will be given to candidates having experience in teaching/Research/Dairy or Food Industry. Young Professional-II (YP-II) (Dairy Chemistry): Post Graduate in Life Sciences/Under Graduate in Veterinary Sciences/ B Tech (Dairy Technology/Dairy Science/Food Technology/Food Process Engineering/Food and Nutrition) or M.Tech (Dairy Chemistry/Food Chemistry/Dairy Technology/Food Technology). Preference will be given to candidates having experience in Teaching/Research/Dairy or Food Industry. Young Professional-II (YP-II) (IT): Graduate with at least 60% marks in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics with one-year experience in relevant field, or Masters in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics. Desirable to have working experience in scientific data handling, research projects, or editorial work. Young Professional-I (YP-I) (IT): Graduates with at least 60% marks in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics. Young Professional-II (YP-II) (IT): Graduates with at least 60% marks in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics with one-year experience in relevant field, or Masters in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics. Experience in handling IT related work, database management, web development, software support or system administration. Working knowledge of programming languages, networking, cyber security and data analysis tools. Proficiency in MS-Office, virtual meeting platforms and other IT Applications.

salary_details.details: Young Professional-II (YP-II): Rs 42,000/- (Consolidated) Young Professional-I (YP-I): Rs 30,000/- (Consolidated)

selection_process: Selection will be purely on merit basis.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR IVRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR IVRI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Young Professional-II (YP-II) (Dairy Engineering): Under Graduate in Engineering/ B Tech (Agricultural Engineering/Dairy Technology/Dairy Science/Food Technology/Food Process Engineering/Food and Nutrition) or M.Tech (Dairy Engineering/Food Process Engineering/Dairy Technology/Food Technology/Mechanical Engineering). Preference will be given to candidates having experience in teaching/Research/Dairy or Food Industry. Young Professional-II (YP-II) (Dairy Chemistry): Post Graduate in Life Sciences/Under Graduate in Veterinary Sciences/ B Tech (Dairy Technology/Dairy Science/Food Technology/Food Process Engineering/Food and Nutrition) or M.Tech (Dairy Chemistry/Food Chemistry/Dairy Technology/Food Technology). Preference will be given to candidates having experience in Teaching/Research/Dairy or Food Industry. Young Professional-II (YP-II) (IT): Graduate with at least 60% marks in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics with one-year experience in relevant field, or Masters in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics. Desirable to have working experience in scientific data handling, research projects, or editorial work. Young Professional-I (YP-I) (IT): Graduates with at least 60% marks in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics. Young Professional-II (YP-II) (IT): Graduates with at least 60% marks in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics with one-year experience in relevant field, or Masters in Computer Application/Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence/ Operating Systems/ Software Engineering/ Computer Graphics. Experience in handling IT related work, database management, web development, software support or system administration. Working knowledge of programming languages, networking, cyber security and data analysis tools. Proficiency in MS-Office, virtual meeting platforms and other IT Applications.

content_sections.text: Young Professional-II (YP-II) (Dairy Engineering): 21 to 45 years Young Professional-II (YP-II) (Dairy Chemistry): Age limit not specified. Young Professional-II (YP-II) (IT): 21 to 45 years Young Professional-I (YP-I) (IT): 21 to 45 years Young Professional-II (YP-II) (IT): 21 to 45 years

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Young Professional-II (YP-II): Rs 42,000/- (Consolidated) Young Professional-I (YP-I): Rs 30,000/- (Consolidated)

content_sections.heading: ICAR IVRI Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be purely on merit basis.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR IVRI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICAR IVRI?
faq.answer: ICAR IVRI has announced a total of 5 vacancies for the Young Professional posts. These positions are available on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is Walk-in. Interested candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview dates vary for different posts, with the earliest being 14 August 2026 and the latest being 19 August 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from Under Graduate in Engineering/B.Tech to Post Graduate degrees in relevant fields like Life Sciences, Veterinary Sciences, and Computer Applications.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for most of the Young Professional posts is between 21 to 45 years. Specific age limits may vary for certain positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Young Professional-II posts?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary offered for Young Professional-II posts is Rs 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for Young Professional-I posts?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary offered for Young Professional-I posts is Rs 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be held at the Indian Veterinary Research Institute (ICAR IVRI), Izatnagar, Uttar Pradesh, 243122.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their bio-data, photograph, original and attested copies of educational qualifications (10th, 12th, Graduation, Post Graduation), and experience certificates (if any).

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for these Young Professional positions.
